---
title: "Carolyn Hong"
description-meta: "Carolyn Hong personal website"
image: "files/images/headshot2.jpeg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:carolynhong@psu.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/carolyn-hong-64a5ba27a/
      target: _blank
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a dual-title PhD student in Sociology & Demography at Penn State. My research focuses on the family-level effects of demographic change.

## Education

-   B.S. Sociology, Brigham Young University (2023)
:::
